package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity_repeated_nested_slice_scans: Layer: Algorithmic complexity. Flag nested slice scans that should be indexed or mapped before joining large collections.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule502PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario502Positive(records []Rule502PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
